description_long: This is a vintage-style briefcase with a rounded, domed top and a dark, reddish-brown leather exterior. The surface is accented with rows of metallic rivets along the edges, giving it a sturdy, reinforced appearance. A single, curved handle made of what appears to be aged metal is attached to the top with two metal brackets. The front features a prominent metal latch mechanism for securing the case, while the back displays two rectangular metal hinges. The sides are plain, with the leather material wrapping smoothly around the curved edges. The overall look suggests a classic, durable design suitable for carrying personal items or documents in an urban environment.
description: A vintage, domed leather briefcase with metal rivets, a curved metal handle, and a front latch closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed leather surface, central metal latch, and rows of rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, curved leather side with no visible hardware.
description_view_2: Back view displaying two rectangular metal hinges and the domed leather surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain, curved leather surface.
attribute_handle_type: Single curved handle, made of aged metal, attached with two metal brackets, fixed and rigid.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Single metal latch on the front, likely a clasp or hook type, centrally located.
